Fields.Name: Sound Bank ID
Fields.Description: Sound bank ID (-1: no bank, other: bank with specified ID)

Fields.Name: Sound Break SE ID
Fields.Description: Destruction sound SEID (9 digits) -1: Generated from assetId

Fields.Name: Draw Param Reference ID
Fields.Description: Drawing parameter reference ID. The reference ID for the part drawing parameter .xlsm.

Fields.Name: Hit Create Type
Fields.Description: Sets the hit build type for static assets. Ignored for dynamic assets.

Fields.Name: Asset Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Dynamic (all asset features available), static (light assets with limited functionality treated as old maps), partially static (partially destroyed assets)

Fields.Name: Collision Detection Type
Fields.Description: Collision detection type. You can set what the asset will hit.

Fields.Name: Rain Blocking Type
Fields.Description: It is a type of rain blocking. You can set the blocking of SFX and wet expression.

Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: Durability until destruction (-1: Indestructible)

Fields.Name: Defence
Fields.Description: Attack power below this value is no damage

Fields.Name: Destruction Stop Time
Fields.Description: Time from destruction to forced stop of rigid body (do not force stop at 0)

Fields.Name: Destruction Particle: ID
Fields.Description: SFX ID on destruction (-1: default (810030))

Fields.Name: Destruction Particle: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: SFX generation position at the time of destruction Dummy Polygon ID (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Landing Destruction Particle: ID
Fields.Description: Object material-dependent SFX identifier that regenerates when first landing after being destroyed (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Destruction Bullet Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Action parameter of [bullet] at the time of destruction (-1: does not occur). Please note that there is an offset specification due to laps.

Fields.Name: Destruction Bullet Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Location of [bullet] at the time of destruction Damipoli ID (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Hidden Debris - Wait Time
Fields.Description: Hidden debris Waiting time (seconds)

Fields.Name: Hidden Debris - Time to Hide
Fields.Description: Time to hide debris (seconds)

Fields.Name: Destruction AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: AI sound ID generated at the time of destruction

Fields.Name: Anim Break ID Max
Fields.Description: What is the animation destruction ID from 0 to what?

Fields.Name: Update Group Mask Limit Frame Number
Fields.Description: Number of frames for group mask switching time

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Player Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when the player touches (0: no, 1:)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Enemy Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when an enemy character touches (0: No, 1: Ru)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Riding
Fields.Description: Will it break if the character gets on (0: it won't break 1: it will break)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Default
Fields.Description: Broken at the initial appearance of the player (0: ru, 1: no)

Fields.Name: Is Animated Destruction
Fields.Description: Is it animation destruction (0: physical destruction, 1: animation destruction)

Fields.Name: Set Update Frequency during Animation to HiActive.
Fields.Description: During anime playback, set the update frequency to HiActive for Asset only

Fields.Name: Set Update Frequency to HiActive
Fields.Description: Set the update frequency to HiActive

Fields.Name: Allow Synchronization Break
Fields.Description: Allow asset to break animation synchronization.

Fields.Name: Is Damage Transferred
Fields.Description: Whether to pass the damage to the other side when receiving damage (0: pass, 1: do not pass)

Fields.Name: Is Attack Backlash
Fields.Description: Do you play the attack (0: do not play, 1: play)

Fields.Name: Disable Bullet Penetration
Fields.Description: Whether the bullet will hit (0: not hit, 1: hit)

Fields.Name: Is Ladder
Fields.Description: Is it a ladder (0: different, 1: yes)

Fields.Name: Is Moving Object
Fields.Description: Is it a moving object? It is a flag used for branching of movement processing at the time of multi (0: different, 1: yes)

Fields.Name: Is Inside Group Hit
Fields.Description: Hit interference in the asset or (0: don't, 1: do)

Fields.Name: Is Paused during Cutscene
Fields.Description: Do you want to stop the animation during the poly play (0: not, 1: do)

Fields.Name: Is Flammable
Fields.Description: Will it burn (0: not, 1:)

Fields.Name: Pre-destruction Navmesh Flag
Fields.Description: Navigation mesh flag set from assets before destruction

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Interval
Fields.Description: Interval (frame) to generate bullets for spreading fire

Fields.Name: Camera Distance to Update Cloth
Fields.Description: Distance from the camera to update havokCloth (0: always update)

Fields.Name: Duration after Creation until Disappearance
Fields.Description: Runtime-generated time after creation until disappearance (0: does not disappear)

Fields.Name: Contact SE ID
Fields.Description: SE ID to play when touched by a local player operated by you (-1: Do not play)

Fields.Name: Fade Out Duration after Generation for Generated Assets
Fields.Description: Fade-out time when runtime-generated assets disappear after generation

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Rate - Before Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind coefficient (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Rate - After Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind coefficient (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Type - Before Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind effect type (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Type - After Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind effect type (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Override Material ID
Fields.Description: Asset material ID overwrite setting (-1: Do not overwrite model material ID 0 or more: Material ID overwrite) On the ladder, the material ID is reflected only with this setting

Fields.Name: Automatic Generation Height Offset
Fields.Description: Height offset of how much it floats from where the raycast hits the map when it is automatically generated [m]

Fields.Name: Burn Time
Fields.Description: Burning time (seconds) (continues to burn at 0)

Fields.Name: Burn Destroy Rate
Fields.Description: Burnup threshold for switching to the ruptured state

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: ID [0]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 0 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: ID [1]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 1 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: ID [2]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 2 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: ID [3]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion: 3 (-1: No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Minimum Delay Time [0]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Minimum Delay Time [1]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Minimum Delay Time [2]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Minimum Delay Time [3]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Maximum Delay Time [0]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Maximum Delay Time [1]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Maximum Delay Time [2]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Particle: Maximum Delay Time [3]
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [0]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 0 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [1]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 1 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [2]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 2 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Behavior ID [3]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning: 3 (-1: does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn Bullet Delay Time
Fields.Description: Time to delay the generation of bullets for fire spread (seconds)

Fields.Name: Paint Decal Target Texture Size
Fields.Description: Paint decal target size 0: Decal disabled (0 to 4096 power of 2 0, 2, 4, 8, 2048 only valid)

Fields.Name: Post-destruction Navmesh Flag
Fields.Description: Navimesh flag set from the destroyed asset

Fields.Name: Auto-Generation of Coverage Area
Fields.Description: Whether to automatically generate coverage area by navmesh data around the asset

Fields.Name: Cast Shadow
Fields.Description: Whether to create a shadow (0: do not create a shadow 1: create a shadow)

Fields.Name: Near Camera Behavior Type
Fields.Description: Drawing settings when approaching the camera.

Fields.Name: Object Defence
Fields.Description: If the bullet parameter 'Object Damage' is greater than this value, the bullet will penetrate.

Fields.Name: Destruction Strength
Fields.Description: Strength to send rigid bodies flying during physical destruction

Fields.Name: Destruction Position
Fields.Description: Base point for sending rigid bodies during physical destruction.

Fields.Name: Is Rotational Destruction
Fields.Description: Should the program control the rotation when it breaks?

Fields.Name: Destroy on Map Collision
Fields.Description: Does it break when touching the map? (0: No, 1: Yes)

Fields.Name: 3D Mini-map Display Type
Fields.Description: Display settings on 3D minimap

Fields.Name: Destruction Rotation Strength
Fields.Description: Strength to rotate a rigid body during physical destruction

Fields.Name: Material affects Physical Behavior
Fields.Description: Does material affect physical behavior?

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Backface Check
Fields.Description: Automatic drawing group_Back side check

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Depth Write
Fields.Description: Auto drawing group_shield

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Contact
Fields.Description: Is it only possible to break by contact destruction?

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed on Character Overlap
Fields.Description: Settings for models that can be destroyed, even if they can go into trees etc.

Fields.Name: Disable Deferred Decals
Fields.Description: Set to disable deferred decals

Fields.Name: Disable Raytracing
Fields.Description: Set this to exclude from late training when it is inconvenient such as a huge shadow falling during late training.

Fields.Name: Disable Depth Prepass
Fields.Description: Configure settings for assets where depth prepass does not function effectively for small, thin, and large quantities of assets such as trees and utility poles.

Fields.Name: Force Motion Blur
Fields.Description: If the weight of the animation or rigid body is not set, motion blur will be disabled, but ignore it and force enable it. Settings for assets that are attached to moving assets, e.g. assets attached to elevators

Fields.Name: Destruction Collision Speed
Fields.Description: Speed ​​of character that can be destroy this upon contact [Km/h]

Fields.Name: Destroyed Item Lot Param ID
Fields.Description: Item to be drawn at the time of destruction Lottery ID. -1 for none.

Fields.Name: Pickup Action Button Param ID
Fields.Description: Action button ID issued for collection. -1 for none.

Fields.Name: Pickup Item Lot Param ID
Fields.Description: Item to be drawn at the time of collection For lottery ID. -1 for none.

Fields.Name: Pickup Item - Animation ID
Fields.Description: Animation ID played when picking up item from asset.

Fields.Name: Auto Draw Group: Pass Pixel Number
Fields.Description: Automatic drawing group: pass pixels (set between 0.0 and 1.0 to enlarge when shooting)

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Wave Simulation
Fields.Description: Is it affected by Havok's wave simulation (before destruction)?

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Wave Simulation (Destroyed)
Fields.Description: Is it affected by Havok's wave simulation (after destruction)?

Fields.Name: Debug: Enable Allowable Height Check
Fields.Description: Allowable ground height check

Fields.Name: Raytracing Culling Mode
Fields.Description: Culling mode applied when drawing raytracing. If it is set to 'Auto', it will be the default value set in the program.

Fields.Name: Buoyancy Lost Timer Delay
Fields.Description: After how many seconds does it start to lose buoyancy? -1 to not lose buoyancy (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Buoyancy Lost Timer Delay (Destroyed)
Fields.Description: After how many seconds does it start to lose buoyancy? -1 to not lose buoyancy (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Buoyancy Lost Timer
Fields.Description: How many seconds does it take to lose buoyancy (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Buoyancy Lost Timer (Destroyed)
Fields.Description: How many seconds does it take to lose buoyancy (after destruction)

Fields.Name: SpEffect Applied on Character Collision
Fields.Description: Special effect ID applied to the character within the hit

Fields.Name: Resident Sound: ID
Fields.Description: Sound ID to be resident in the asset (9 digits) (-1: Not resident)

Fields.Name: Resident Sound: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Dummy Polygon ID (-1: Placement position) to attach Sound to

Fields.Name: Resident Sound: Effective Distance
Fields.Description: Distance to enable resident sound (m) (0 or less: always enabled)

Fields.Name: Debug: Allowable Ground Height (Min)
Fields.Description: In metres - Must be smaller than the maximum

Fields.Name: Debug: Allowable Ground Height (Max)
Fields.Description: In metres - Must be greater than the minimum

Fields.Name: Destruction Sound: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Dummy poly ID of the location where the destruction sound is played (-1: placement position)

Fields.Name: Destruction Particle: Offset X
Fields.Description: Coordinates to offset for breakSfxCpId field

Fields.Name: Destruction Particle: Offset Y
Fields.Description: Coordinates to offset for breakSfxCpId field

Fields.Name: Destruction Particle: Offset Z
Fields.Description: Coordinates to offset for breakSfxCpId field

Fields.Name: Particle: Shape
Fields.Description: The shape of the particles

Fields.Name: Particle: Size
Fields.Description: In metres

Fields.Name: Particle: Minimum Speed when Generated
Fields.Description: In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Particle: Maximum Speed when Generated
Fields.Description: In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Destruction: Decal ID
Fields.Description: Decal ID at the time of destruction (-1: None)

Fields.Name: Destruction: Decal Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: Decal generation position dummy poly ID when destroyed (-1: Generated from the center, -2: Placement position)

Fields.Name: Is Material Set in Navmesh upon Asset Destruction
Fields.Description: Set materials for destruction assets on navmesh

Fields.Name: Is Important Grid for World Slide
Fields.Description: Will it be registered in the important grid with background shift?

Fields.Name: Is Huge Grid for World Slide
Fields.Description: Register in the huge grid with background shift

Fields.Name: Is Disabled in Destroy the Mining Ship Mission
Fields.Description: Can it be disabled in a mining ship mission?

Fields.Name: No Checkpoint Save
Fields.Description: Is not saved in checkpoint

Fields.Name: Check for Cover when Hit
Fields.Description: Whether to check for cover when hit (damage diversion assets only)
